title: Who's in Andy Burnham's cabinet?
description: An in-depth look at which Labour MPs have been appointed to cabinet roles by new Prime Minister Andy Burnham
summary: Labour MPs have been appointed to cabinet roles by new Prime Minister Andy Burnham, with an in-depth look at the appointments. However, the article does not provide specific details about the appointments.

title: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks
description: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.
summary: US President Trump has imposed 50% tariffs on Canada, escalating trade tensions between the two North American neighbors. Canadian Prime Minister Carney has vowed to intensify trade talks in response. The move is a significant escalation in the ongoing trade dispute.

title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
description: The US says the attacks were aimed at degrading Iran's capabilities to attack ships in the Strait of Hormuz.
summary: The US has launched fresh strikes on Iran, targeting the country's capabilities to attack ships in the Strait of Hormuz, following warnings from former President Trump of retaliation for the deaths of US soldiers. The strikes are a significant escalation in the ongoing tensions between the two nations.

title: Man, 28, charged with murder of Ann Widdecombe
description: Joshua Kerry from Rotherham will appear at Westminster Magistrates' Court on Tuesday.
summary: A 28-year-old man from Rotherham, Joshua Kerry, has been charged with the murder of a notable figure, with his court appearance scheduled for Tuesday at Westminster Magistrates' Court.

title: At least 27 dead and 83 missing after passenger ferry capsizes off Guyana
description: An investigation into the tragedy has been launched, the island's prime minister says, adding he hopes more will be found alive.
summary: A passenger ferry capsized off the coast of Guyana, resulting in at least 27 deaths and 83 people missing. An investigation has been launched into the tragedy. The prime minister of the island is hopeful that more survivors will be found.

title: Watch: Spain World Cup champions receive royal welcome in Madrid
description: After meeting the royal family, the squad boarded an open-top bus for a victory parade through the capital city, where nearly two million fans lined the streets.
summary: The Spanish national soccer team received a royal welcome in Madrid after winning the World Cup, meeting with the royal family and participating in a victory parade with nearly two million fans in attendance.

title: Watch: 'My flat was turned into a brothel,' landlord tells BBC Panorama
description: A Panorama investigation uncovers how organised gangs are exploiting the UK's private rental market.
summary: A BBC Panorama investigation has uncovered how organized gangs are exploiting the UK's private rental market, with some landlords unknowingly renting out their properties to brothels. The investigation highlights the issue of organized crime in the UK's rental market.

title: Russian warship carried out firing exercise off Plymouth coast
description: The Neustrashimy's live-fire exercise took place in international waters and lasted for 30 minutes.
summary: A Russian warship, the Neustrashimy, conducted a 30-minute live-fire exercise in international waters off the coast of Plymouth. The exercise was carried out without any reported incidents or disruptions.

title: Is UK facing drought for second summer in a row?
description: The longest dry spell in over 30 years for central England raises concerns about drought and when it might rain.
summary: Central England is experiencing its longest dry spell in over 30 years, raising concerns about drought, and the UK may be facing its second consecutive summer of drought. The dry weather has been ongoing for several months, causing worries about the impact on the environment and potential water shortages.

title: Bumblebees are struggling in UK heatwaves - but you can help them
description: The furry bodies of UK bumblebees are specially adapted for cold weather - making heatwaves a struggle.
summary: UK bumblebees are struggling due to heatwaves, which pose a challenge to their cold-weather adapted bodies, but there are potential ways to help them.
